title: Ditto

[ar:NewJeans (뉴진스)]
[al:NewJeans 'OMG']

[offset:0]
Ditto - NewJeans (뉴진스)

Woo woo woo woo ooh

Stay in the middle
Like you a little
Don't want no riddle
